title: [CI:DOCS] Clarify passthrough_envars() comments
body:
A long time ago, `passthrough_envars()` was defined in `lib.sh`.  It has since been moved, but the related comments were never updated.  Update the env. var. comments pointing future maintainers to the function that relies on them.  Otherwise a simple search w/in this repo. won't turn up anything.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
